instructions: GitHub CLI tools for operations against remote GitHub repositories via the GitHub API. All tools require network connectivity and the commit/branch to be pushed to GitHub. This is NOT a replacement for local git — for local git operations (git show, git log, git diff, git status) use Bash directly. Use these tools exclusively for GitHub-specific data: pull requests, issues, CI runs, jobs, and PR associations for pushed commits. Requires the gh CLI to be installed and authenticated (gh auth login). Configure a default repository via .mcp-gh-tooling.json to avoid passing 'repo' to every tool call.
